case_title: MARIA ESTHER DAWKINS VS. SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAWKINS, MARIA ESTHER SERVED OCT-27-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR MAY-21-2012. MAR-23-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR GARRY JOHN HUBERT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR GARRY JOHN HUBERT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAWKINS, MARIA ESTHER AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-23-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-19-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-08-2012
OBJECTION AND JURY TRIAL DEMAND FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE MAY-31-2012.

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF IS DENIED. EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS OF SUIT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT, AWARD OF ARBITRATOR, DATED AUG-01-2012.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAWKINS, MARIA ESTHER SERVED OCT-31-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY
ARBITRATOR JAMES NAJEEB SINUNU APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JUN-01-2012 THROUGH AUG-30-2012.
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR SINUNU, JAMES NAJEEB
